title: Ars Structurize
description: This mod adds several new structures, all of which are themed after Ars Nouveau.
body:
![A archwood village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DvefCrO7/images/f6b19eed4e5093cf48836e072d95f3f1fa8c0fde.png)

This mod adds several new structures(arch wood village, book wyrm library, etc), all of which are themed after Ars Nouveau. Most of these structures will be found in arch wood forests.

This mod requires Ars Nouveau (and it's dependents) to run.

Current version is 1.20.1

This does not add any new blocks, textures or mobs. Most of these structures are "villager" or "friendly" type structures. This mod is not associated with any other "Structurize" mods.
